Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Heheh... Definitely not my proudest moment there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh yeah! That surprised me, too, bud![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So it really was you that day, huh![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Kinda seems like destiny, don't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Come to think of it, that was the same day Sanada-san found me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I had nowhere to be, so I was just chillin' in the convenience store and readin' magazines when the Dark Hour hit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You were pretty much a sitting duck, about to burst into tears. Man, your face was more terrifying than any Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}W-Well, what was I supposed to do!? That was the scariest damn moment of my life, man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}My life back then, what with my old man and all, was... I dunno, not boring, but... Well, you saw what it was like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}So staying at the dorm, fighting Shadows and everything... It's been unreal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Unlike my sister and me, other people usually have a reason to awaken...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}However, in my case, it happened in reverse. I possessed the power first, then discovered my true feelings later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hmm... I think I'm starting to get it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}The doors only show us memories of great significance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Once they've served their purpose, they disappear. Those that remain have yet to fulfill their roles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'm not entirely sure... But if we keep exploring, I think we'll be able to find out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}So let's keep going—together. Okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Discovering my own reason came[n]so naturally that I never thought[n]much of it until then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}She's so full of emotion,[n]nothing like me when I reactivated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}...Even though she's never had[n]any contact with other people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Does she have a memory of her own[n]where she discovers her reason?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}The seed of curiosity was planted,[n]and I started to wonder...[n]{f 1 1}
